IOC Certified Coach

Our Philosophy

Expert Coaching.
Uncompromising Safety.

❧

Progression happens when you feel safe. Training at UGH is led by an IOC Certified Sports Coach with deep, technical expertise across a wide range of fitness and sports equipment. We don't just teach balance; we ensure every rider is equipped with the right gear for their specific body mechanics and surface. No guesswork. Just structured, safe skill development.

  • Certified Instruction

    IOC-backed coaching methodologies, structured for real progression.

  • Complete Gear Audits

    Expert advice on skate setups and protective gear tailored to your body.

  • All Skill Levels

    Dedicated curriculums from absolute beginners to advanced gliders.

IOC

Certified Sports Coaching Standard

360°

Full Gear & Safety Audit Included

0→∞

Beginner to Advanced Pathways

Safety First ✦
The UGH Movement

Be the Ink, Not the Paper.
Be the Player, Not the Fan.

✦

Urban Gliding Hyderabad (UGH) is more than a skate club; it is a movement toward clean living and outdoor resilience. We trade screens for pavement. We build focus, physical conditioning, and real-world connections. Whether you are stepping onto a board for the first time or looking for a crew to cruise the city streets, this is your starting line.

“

Building confidence, one glide at a time.

L

Coach Leela Madhav

Founder & Community Lead, UGH

Privacy Policy

Urban Gliding Hyderabad collects name and contact details solely for session coordination. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.

Refund Policy

Cancellations made 24 hours before the first session are eligible for a 100% refund. No refunds are provided once the second session of a pack has commenced.

Terms & Conditions

Participation in UGH activities is at the student's own risk. Safety gear (helmet, knee pads, elbow pads) is mandatory for all training sessions.
